sources.description: Package releases, deprecations, license metadata, and release notes
sources.connector: npm/PyPI/Cargo/Maven API, Dependabot, lockfile parser, or fixture

sources.description: Security advisories, severity, affected versions, fix versions, and exposure notes
sources.connector: GitHub Security Advisory, OSV, Snyk export, or fixture

notes: Do not commit private vulnerability evidence or embargoed advisory details.
Dependency changes and security disclosures remain human gates.
